title: Gold for the Caesars
director: André De Toth, Sabatino Ciuffini, Riccardo Freda
writer: Sabatino Ciuffini, Millard Lampell, Arnold Perl
actors: Jeffrey Hunter, Mylène Demongeot, Ron Randell
plot: A slave architect in Gaul is ordered by a Roman governor to lead an expedition, constantly under danger of attack by Celtic warriors, to the Valley of the Sil to find much-needed gold for Rome.
